entries.glyph_concept: The Logo — one eye, four directions. System identifier. The symbol.
entries.usage: System tag, domain identifier, page icon for all Glyph records

entries.glyph_concept: The Graph — signal line. Position ratio r output. The excluded variable rising.
entries.usage: K(t) output visualization, r value display, signal trace

entries.glyph_concept: The Compass — navigator. Record type routing. N=A, E=B, S=C, W=D, epsilon=SE.
entries.usage: Record type selector, routing map navigation, app sidebar

entries.glyph_concept: The Clock — time. Interval and temporal class. Time is now and then.
entries.usage: Interval field, temporal class band, timeline views

entries.glyph_concept: The Coin — heads: choice (13/13). Tails: erased. The irreversible event binary.
entries.usage: Event field, irreversible moment tag, coin game product icon

entries.glyph_concept: Type A — Event-Cycle. Bounded interval plus irreversible event. The cycle.
entries.usage: Record type A label, event-cycle row tag

entries.glyph_concept: Type B — Concentration. Observed vs expected share. HHI, Gini, structural constant.
entries.usage: Record type B label, concentration row tag, share distribution viz

entries.glyph_concept: Type C — Rate. Participation rate, flow, ratio over time.
entries.usage: Record type C label, rate row tag, EDD/Jordan/Venmo flows

entries.glyph_concept: Type D — Theory. Method specification only. No r value computed.
entries.usage: Record type D label, theory row tag, patent and spec docs

entries.glyph_concept: System — domain tag. The named system under analysis (PMIX, Savannah, EDD, Egypt).
entries.usage: system_name field, master event table column 1

entries.glyph_concept: Carrier — what carries the signal. Claims count, dollars, population share.
entries.usage: carrier_name field, master event table column 2, EDD dual-carrier tag

entries.glyph_concept: Interval — the bounded time window. Total cycle length. Denominator of r.
entries.usage: interval_length field, master event table column 3

entries.glyph_concept: Event — the irreversible moment. Birth, death, hire, fire, claim, flip.
entries.usage: event_name field, master event table column 4, Fire element

entries.glyph_concept: Position ratio — r = event_position / total_interval_length. The core ratio.
entries.usage: position_ratio field, master event table column 5, r value

entries.glyph_concept: Source — citation, dataset origin, source register entry.
entries.usage: source_id field, Sheet 01_Source_Register

entries.glyph_concept: Temporal: discrete — interval 1–100 units. Coin flips, card draws.
entries.usage: Temporal class band label, discrete row filter

entries.glyph_concept: Temporal: daily — interval 1–365 days. EDD weekly claims, birth by day.
entries.usage: Daily temporal band, Valley Harvest seasonal tag

entries.glyph_concept: Temporal: seasonal — quarterly cycles, environmental rhythms.
entries.usage: Seasonal temporal band, harvest cycles, quarterly data

entries.glyph_concept: Temporal: multi_year — 10–50 year intervals. Jordan Brand arc, EDD multi-year.
entries.usage: Multi-year temporal band, long-run dataset filter

entries.glyph_concept: Temporal: lifespan — 50–100 years. Human life course datasets.
entries.usage: Lifespan temporal band, CDC life tables

entries.glyph_concept: Temporal: generational — 100–500 years. Savannah 1820–1860.
entries.usage: Generational temporal band, slavery dataset, contested freedom

entries.glyph_concept: Temporal: historical — 500–5000 years. Callback studies, electoral data.
entries.usage: Historical temporal band, callback DR (1989–2017)

entries.glyph_concept: Temporal: civilizational — 5001+ years. Egypt, Rome, Persia, Maya.
entries.usage: Civilizational temporal band, BCDE antiquity records

entries.glyph_concept: App: Dashboard — master view of all records and K(t) state.
entries.usage: Glyph Event Record Lab home screen, Notion workspace home

entries.glyph_concept: App: Add Record — create new master event table entry.
entries.usage: New record button, Notion inline add, app primary action

entries.glyph_concept: App: Source Register — Sheet 01. 23 sources with full citation metadata.
entries.usage: Source register tab, XLSX sheet 01, source_id lookup

entries.glyph_concept: App: Routing Map — Sheet 03. 33 datasets routed to A/B/C/D.
entries.usage: Dataset routing map tab, XLSX sheet 03

entries.glyph_concept: App: K(t) Engine — compute layer. K(t) = Σ[(C_j·R_j)/ΔS_j] + ε
entries.usage: Engine config, glyph8.py settings, K(t) parameter tuning

entries.glyph_concept: App: Graph Output — r values plotted, structural band shown.
entries.usage: Visualization tab, Sheet 10_Graph1_EventPos

entries.glyph_concept: App: Export — XLSX archive, CSV, JSON from master event table.
entries.usage: Export button, GLYPH_DT.xlsx sync

entries.glyph_concept: App: Search — filter by domain, temporal class, record type, r value range.
entries.usage: Record filter, Notion database views

entries.glyph_concept: App: Sync — Notion ↔ XLSX ↔ Python engine.
entries.usage: Sync button, Cloudflare worker, Notion API connection

entries.glyph_concept: Brand: Heyer Livin' — umbrella entity. Cultural intelligence. Fire element.
entries.usage: Brand header, entity tag, storefront umbrella icon

entries.glyph_concept: Brand: Water / Valley Harvest Goods. Material, seasonal, LLC.
entries.usage: Valley Harvest tag, Water element, syrup/mixer products

entries.glyph_concept: Brand: Air / TwoSeven. Education, cultural transmission.
entries.usage: TwoSeven tag, Air element, education platform icon

entries.glyph_concept: Brand: Dream Kidz — early childhood, entry layer.
entries.usage: Dream Kidz tag, entry layer icon, early childhood products

entries.glyph_concept: Verified — source-linked, replicated, in-band confirmed.
entries.usage: Verification badge, 12 proven structural constants

entries.glyph_concept: Excluded — conversion queue. Dataset needs more fields before r can be computed.
entries.usage: Sheet 12_Exclusions, blocked records

entries.glyph_concept: In-band — r ∈ [0.37, 0.43]. Counts toward K_total.
entries.usage: In-band badge, Sheet 11_Kt_Main_TypeA

entries.glyph_concept: Out-of-band — r outside [0.37, 0.43]. Excluded from structural claim.
entries.usage: Out-of-band badge, red zone marker

entries.glyph_concept: Blocked — excluded from compute. Missing fields documented.
entries.usage: Exclusion badge, Sheet 12_Exclusions

entries.glyph_concept: Locked — architecture decision final. Do not change.
entries.usage: Locked decision badge, two-site architecture, final schema

entries.glyph_concept: Open — in progress, not yet decided.
entries.usage: Open task badge, pending decision, conversion queue

entries.glyph_concept: Unverified — claim made, source not yet linked or replicated.
entries.usage: Unverified claim badge, Research Claims database

entries.glyph_concept: Ratio — r value. The position ratio. 0.39 structural constant.
entries.usage: r value display, structural band reference, K_total label

entries.glyph_concept: Record stack — four types (A/B/C/D) layered. Full schema view.
entries.usage: Schema overview, XLSX sheet stack, record type legend

entries.glyph_concept: K(t) output — computed attractor. X̄ = 0.390992. The proof.
entries.usage: K_total badge, convergence proof result
